changeReason: Improved translation from Japanese. Old: "Closing on Short Notice"

TextENGNew: ``Oh, sorry. We're already closed...@k@vS20/00/VTT_mamoru3002. Oh, it's just you, Saeki.``
``...What's wrong?``
Chisato took another step into the store, then just stopped and stood there dejectedly. Sensing something strange about the situation, Mamoru stopped washing the dishes and turned to her.
It was hard to see in the dark, but... Chisato's eyes and nose were bright red.
Normally, he would make a joke about that... but Mamoru remembered their last encounter and decided not to push it.
``Anyway... take a seat.@k@vS20/00/VTT_mamoru3005. Can I get you something to drink?``
Chisato shook her head... and broke into tears again as though I'd set her off, before wiping them away.
...Mamoru reluctantly came out from behind the counter and tried to cheer her up by making her sit at the counter seat.
Then, he turned over the ``closed`` sign at the front door.
``...Now that you're a seated customer, order someting already.@k@vS20/00/VTT_mamoru3007. If you don't say something quickly, I'll make you a huge helping of nabeyaki udon.``
``...Got it. Mixed juice, then?@k@vS20/00/VTT_mamoru3009. And don't complain to me later.``
In a familiar gesture, Mamoru threw the fruit and ice into the mixer, then poured the milk and cream inside and covered the mixer with the lid.
After spinning for a while, he pulled a chilled glass out of the refrigerator, which he had intended to use for a drink himself after closing, and poured the mixed juice into the cold glass.
``...There you are.@k@vS20/00/VTT_mamoru3011. If you don't drink it quickly, it'll solidify.``
Chisato finally answered, then stuck a straw inside and took two big gulps. ...When he saw that, he didn't sense even an ounce of her usual energetic personality.
(...Come to think of it, I haven't seen her use a straw like that in years.)
Mamoru murmured that to himself... and the moment he turned his back to continue washing the dishes, Chisato called out to him in a hoarse voice.
``...Mamoru-san.``
``Am I... a terrible person?``
``......@k@vS20/37/VTT_chisa3113.I'm a terrible person, aren't I...?``
He caught a glimpse of Chisato holding the glass in both hands, sobbing with her head down.
Mamoru's shoulders drooped as he witnessed such a fragile display, and he thought about saying something to console her... but he had second thoughts and chose another direction for the conversation.
``So?@k@vS20/00/VTT_mamoru3016. ...What kind of response are you looking for, my lady?``
Feeling a little surprised, Chisato raised her head. Seeing that, Mamoru crossed his arms and wrinkled his eyebrows.

``On the surface, you're a good person.@k@vS20/00/VTT_mamoru3018. But when it comes to your usual banter, you're completely hopeless.@k@vS20/00/VTT_mamoru3019. If you want to drown yourself in self-deprecation, I could join in and say you're a terrible person...``
``...And what about how you really feel?``
``I'm speaking from the heart. Do you believe me now?``
``...Good point.@k@vS20/37/VTT_chisa3116. I had a feeling you'd say that.``
``...Correction.@k@vS20/00/VTT_mamoru3022. You're a terrible person when it comes to that one aspect.``
After those harsh words from Mamoru, Chisato froze.
...But when she felt him gazing at her with a gentle expression, she raised her head again.
``Back in the day... I used to hate you.``
``You were always behaving like an over-the-top, selfish, stuck-up lady.@k@vS20/00/VTT_mamoru3025. And always acting gloomy, like you were the world's most tragic princess.``
``So you always looked to others for comfort and sympathy, but in exchange you were extremely skeptical, and were never satisfied with anyone's words.``
``Ahaha... That's a mean thing to say.``
Yet, his words didn't sound hurtful. ...Because Mamoru had already criticized Chisato about this in the past.
Nobody had ever spoken to her in such patronizing language before that.
So, she could never forget. And that made her happy...
``But, you've changed.@k@vS20/00/VTT_mamoru3028. You worked hard and put in a lot of effort... even if you were slow to make progress, things improved enough that you could hold your head up high.``
``Well, you still tend to rely on others with that same stuffy lady persona, like right now.``
``...Then, you still hate me, even now?``

``...Do I look that charitable?@k@vS20/00/VTT_mamoru3031. If someone I hated came here just before closing time, I'd kick them to the curb immediately.@k@vS20/00/VTT_mamoru3032. Just what do you see when you look at me?``
``......@k@vS20/37/VTT_chisa3122.A guy who's extremely overconfident in himself, and arrogantly believes he's always right, I guess.``
``Ahahahah...``
The mood finally lightened enough for Chisato to laugh at Mamoru.
Unlike Tamako, Akira, and especially Natsumi... he was the ``older brother`` figure that Chisato felt comfortable showing weakness to.
``Hey, Saeki.@k@vS20/00/VTT_mamoru3036. ...Don't go torturing yourself too much to make yourself feel better.``
``...I don't know what you mean.@k@vS20/37/VTT_chisa3126. How does torturing yourself make you feel better?``
``Well, because it's easy to blame yourself.@k@vS20/00/VTT_mamoru3038. Because if you want to blame someone else, you have to explain your reasoning.``
He was completely right, Chisato thought.
In order to admonish another person properly, it's necessary to objectively grasp the problem and prove it to the other person.
Passing on this responsibility and pretending to be critical is actually just avoiding the problem.
``Well, don't dwell on it too much.@k@vS20/00/VTT_mamoru3040. Besides, you have some good traits now that you didn't have before, right?``
``Such as?``
``How you're such an idiot that no medicine can cure you, for one.``
``...That's not a compliment at all.``
``In general, if you go around thinking everything is bad, you're going to feel bad.@k@vS20/00/VTT_mamoru3043. And it's easy to transmit that insecurity to others.``

``So no matter when, no matter where, you need to stay confident and believe in yourself.@k@vS20/00/VTT_mamoru3045. Isn't it deceitful to make others believe in something if you don't believe in it yourself?``

``Even if you're wrong, just be cognizant of others and fix it.@k@vS20/00/VTT_mamoru3047. So, forget everything else, believe in your convictions, and push yourself forward.@k@vS20/00/VTT_mamoru3048. And in order to do that, you have to be a little stupid... right?``
``...That's some seriously messed up logic~.``
Even so... Chisato was somehow able to grasp what he meant.
Courage and willpower are necessary to convince yourself that you're doing the right thing.
``Even so, where do you get your confidence from?@k@vS20/37/VTT_chisa3133. I want you to tell me your secret.``
``Well, the person I fell in love with always said ``I love people who are calm and self-confident.``@k@vS20/00/VTT_mamoru3050. So I've been working towards that goal every day.``
``Huh...? You haven't given up yet?@k@vS20/37/VTT_chisa3135. I'm pretty sure you got a clear rejection back then!``
``Still, she keeps coming to this shop, so I believe there's still a chance.@k@vS20/00/VTT_mamoru3052. ...Is that so strange?``
``What are you talking about?@k@vS20/37/VTT_chisa3137. Anyone is free to come here.@k@vS20/37/VTT_chisa3138. Who else would come to this messy shop alone otherwise?``
Of course, she retorted with her usual bluster... but her real intention was actually different.
When she was around him, it made her want to indulge in being spoiled.
And he was willing to keep supporting her, without asking anything in return.
And that made her happy. ...But also sad.
She thought that it only justified her own weakness.
That was why... she didn't want to fall in love with him right now.
At least, not until they both had the strength and confidence to speak with each other as equals...
``Still, it's been a really long time since I heard you call me that.@k@vS20/00/VTT_mamoru3054. ...Mamoru-san.``
``Ugh?!@k@vS20/37/VTT_chisa3140. D-damn it...!!``
What was she missing...? What could she do for that girl?
Chisato decided she needed to give it more thought...
